name: S'more Bars
recipeIngredient: 8 Hershey's milk chocolate bars = (1.55 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, beat the butter until softened. Add sugar and beat on medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Blend in egg and vanilla extract.
3. Stir together graham cracker crumbs, flour, and salt until combined. Set aside 2-1/2 cups of this mixture.
4. Press the remaining mixture into the bottom of the prepared pan. Place chocolate bars on top of the mixture, breaking them to fit if necessary.
5. Sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the chocolate bars in the pan. Top with the reserved graham cracker crumb mixture.
6. Bake for 30 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes in the pan on a wire rack before cutting into bars. Allow to cool completely, resulting in about 24 bars.
